text:
I’m extremely obsessive with code quality on these things. Knew something was off 4 weeks ago and it progressively got worse. 

Cancelled my Claude substitution a few days ago - opus 4.6 when released was absolutely magic. I’m sure they will fix it but it is unusable right now. https://twitter.com/roundtablespace/status/2041897604708233650

classification.reason: User discusses cancelling Claude subscription due to quality degradation, comparing current version unfavorably to previous opus release
